code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut seen = "|"
mut count = 0
mut start = -1
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(text, i)
  when Some(b)
    let ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 11 or b == 12 or b == 13
    if ws
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(text, start, i)
        let key = "|#{tok}|"
        if not string.contains(seen, key)
          seen = "#{seen}#{tok}|"
          count = count + 1
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
  when None
    start = start
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start >= 0
  let tok = string.substring(text, start, n)
  let key = "|#{tok}|"
  if not string.contains(seen, key)
    count = count + 1
  end
end
println("unique=#{count}")
